summary: Phase 09 content is aligned and checks pass when rerun, but the governed route is not correctly bound to Phase 09: canonical task/session state still points to the Phase 07 remediation contract, so route integrity is not closed.

blockers.title: Phase 09 lacks canonical governed-route binding
blockers.why: The canonical handoff/task state still points to the Phase 07 remediation task, there is no active Phase 09 task note, and scoped validators/gates therefore bind to the wrong phase contract. That violates mandatory route integrity even though content-side docs, architecture alignment, and tests look good.
blockers.remediation: Start or switch the governed continuation to an explicit active Phase 09 task note, update session handoff and task index to that Phase 09 route, then rerun the phase-scoped validation/gate commands and refresh the worker evidence from that corrected route.

blockers.title: Required evidence is missing
blockers.why: No active governed Phase 09 task note is present in canonical task/session state.
blockers.remediation: Produce the missing evidence and rerun acceptance.

blockers.title: Required evidence is missing
blockers.why: Current gate evidence is attached to the Phase 07 remediation route instead of a Phase 09 route contract.
blockers.remediation: Produce the missing evidence and rerun acceptance.

blockers.title: Prohibited acceptance finding present
blockers.why: Phase work advanced while the canonical governed route still pointed to an earlier remediation phase.
blockers.remediation: Resolve the prohibited condition and rerun acceptance.
